# Pinned dependencies — this is the lockfile.
#
# Generated from requirements.in. Do NOT edit by hand. To change deps:
#   1. edit requirements.in
#   2. run: pip-compile --resolver=backtracking requirements.in -o requirements.txt
#
# Until requirements.lock (transitive pinning via pip-compile) is checked in,
# this file pins direct deps with ~= (compatible release). The major-version
# bumps in the LangChain ecosystem make exact pinning the safe default.

# Core
streamlit~=1.57
python-dotenv~=1.0

# AI / LangChain (minor pin — they break majors)

langchain-openai~=1.2
langchain-google-genai~=4.2
langgraph~=1.2
langgraph-supervisor~=0.0.31
openai>=1.3.0
